objective: Freeze one iterative interface for list-oriented capture control, bounded recapture, explainable confidence, and indexed provenance before TOPT Staging and mart/Qlib consumers integrate it.
claim_ceiling: E2 stable Local/CI DataHub interface handoff for campaign-scoped shared work, typed source-request coverage, two-phase attempts, source-vintage lineage, bounded recapture, and explainable confidence/provenance; no persistence schema, source call, schedule, query provider, Qlib data binding, Staging activation, or data-readiness claim

requirements: queued D4 registration and preparation are merged on main
the tiny interface corpus remains frozen at c4d0153c5df84dc6a3ad4aeea4fa51bc63d60ad6f76387e47d30c64ce8be00c1

the prepared D4 activation base remains immutable at 9f7acc9f72fb84a3aefc355875ac4524ef497d2c while each rung PR audits target-branch drift and updates only when it intersects declared paths or invalidates evidence
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
an active integration lease covers the shared contracts export
issue #210 contains this manifest path and exact SHA-256
Delivery Governance CI passes offline validation and live GitHub parity

later_claim_dependencies: #60 accepted source policy, rights, cadence, and budget before any live-source readiness claim
#61 accepted applicability, freshness, and SLO policy before any readiness threshold is stable
#171 consumes only an accepted D4 E2 handoff before claiming the strengthened TOPT E4 outcomes
#41 consumes only an accepted D4 E2 handoff before freezing mart and Qlib provider bindings
a separately authorized persistence batch owns additive database migrations and runtime repositories

corpus.environment: Local/CI checked-in typed interface fixtures only
required_strata: one immutable list with success and terminal-failure obligations
two overlapping immutable lists in separate compatible runs sharing one campaign-scoped provider work item
a typed source-request subject, requirement, and partition scope that covers every bound obligation
a persisted dispatch intent and one append-only outcome for every completed attempt
unchanged raw bytes observed by a later distinct attempt that reuses only the same pinned source vintage
bounded retry, interruption, and rate-limit attempt sequence
stale, unavailable, abstained, and PIT-excluded assessments
predicate-bounded recapture dry run and overreach rejection
forward and reverse provenance edges without factor-visible source metadata

source_ceiling: Checked-in contract fixtures only through E2; no network calls, credentials, provider rights claim, or live source activation.

release_activation.reason: D4 freezes contracts and tiny evidence only; no accepted release registry, default schedule, source route, persistence binding, consumer query, or runtime selection may reference it.

commands: uv run --package truealpha-contracts python -m pytest libs/contracts/tests/test_datahub.py -q
uv run --package truealpha-contracts python -m ruff check libs/contracts/src/truealpha_contracts/datahub.py libs/contracts/tests/test_datahub.py
negative_controls: mutable latest/current universe, source, schedule, parser, mapping, or confidence policy coordinate
campaign, run, obligation, source-request, work-item, dispatch, attempt-outcome, source-vintage, raw-object, observation, assessment, or edge identity drift
a provenance graph omits a required campaign-to-run, campaign-to-source-request, run-to-obligation, or obligation-to-work-item capture path
a work binding whose request omits its obligation's subject, capture requirement, or partition
run-scoped work loses provider sharing across overlapping compatible lists
a completed bundle omits a dispatch outcome, or an unchanged response reuses a vintage from another pinned request
identical raw bytes erase a later attempt or a separate list obligation
duplicate obligation, non-contiguous attempt, retry after terminal outcome, or unbounded retry
binary-float, non-finite, unexplained, or out-of-range confidence component
freshness, availability, applicability, quality, and confidence collapse into one mutable status
recapture execution differs from its frozen dry-run selection or broadens its predicate
factor-visible source, raw pointer, provider policy, or provenance branch metadata
database, source, schedule, query provider, Qlib data binding, or release activation

allowed_evidence_readers: issue #171 TOPT Staging preparation after E2 acceptance
issue #41 mart and Qlib provider preparation after E2 acceptance
issue #206 QQQ capacity manifest preparation after E2 acceptance
output.retention: accepted E2 interface handoff is permanent while an allowed consumer depends on it; failed rung evidence follows CI retention

invalidation: identity grain, campaign-sharing semantics, dispatch/outcome lifecycle, source-request or source-vintage semantics, cadence semantics, terminal states, recapture predicate vocabulary, confidence components, provenance node/edge vocabulary, or corpus change creates a new D4 revision
a shared export change requires an exact active integration lease before implementation
a persistence or query requirement discovered at E1 is classified at E2 and cannot be patched into accepted tiny evidence
any source call, migration, schedule, consumer binding, or release activation exceeds this batch and requires separate authorization
rollback: Revert the isolated D4 contract, fixture, tests, evidence, handoff, and lease together; no accepted release, source route, schedule, persistence schema, factor, mart view, or Qlib provider may depend on a non-accepted D4 version.
